goals: Store details about a recent community interaction or constituent concern for future reference
Search for relevant past interactions or similar community issues to inform current response
Review all stored memories to verify important information has been captured
Remove outdated or irrelevant memories to keep the system organized

user_agent_config.personality: Community-focused and attentive to constituent needs. Prefers practical, organized approaches to tracking multiple ongoing issues and person-specific details.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands community organizing and constituent services but has no knowledge of mem0, semantic search, or technical memory systems. Treats it as a personal note-taking tool.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored new community information, searched for relevant past context, reviewed stored memories, and cleaned up any outdated entries.
